question: Quel outil CI/CD, quelles stages et quality gates pour le pipeline ?

principles.text: GitHub Actions pour les equipes sur GitHub : 53% adoption (SO 2024), 61% equipes 2-10 devs (JetBrains), integration native, 2000 min/mois gratuit, onboarding < 1 jour.

sources.name: SWEBOK v4
sources.quote: Automated build should include compilation, testing, static analysis, packaging

sources.name: DORA State of DevOps 2024
sources.quote: Teams that can onboard a new developer to the pipeline in under 1 day deploy 3x more frequently

sources.name: JetBrains 2024 — GitHub Actions 52%, 61% in 2-10 dev teams

principles.text: Pipeline en 3 phases : PR (lint, build, test, static analysis, security scan) → Merge staging (build artifact, push registry, deploy staging, smoke test) → Merge main (deploy prod avec approbation, smoke test, tag release).

sources.name: DORA — quality gates at PR level = strongest predictor of low change failure rate

principles.text: Quality gates bloquants : zero lint violations, 100% tests pass, SonarQube (80% coverage new code, 0 bugs, 3% duplication), zero critical/high CVE, smoke test HTTP 200, >= 1 reviewer.
Optimisation : build < 10 min (4x deployment frequency), paralleliser lint/build/test, cache Maven/npm, fail fast (lint avant tests lourds), trunk-based development (-50% change failure rate).

sources.name: DORA State of DevOps 2024
sources.quote: Build times under 10 minutes correlate with 4x higher deployment frequency
